mapper.select: SELECT id, business_domain_id, code, channel, expires_at, max_uses, used_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM invitation_code WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invitation_code WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId}
SELECT id, business_domain_id, code, channel, expires_at, max_uses, used_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM invitation_code WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, business_domain_id, code, channel, expires_at, max_uses, used_count, status FROM invitation_code WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND code = #{code} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invitation_code ( business_domain_id, code, channel, expires_at, max_uses, used_count, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{businessDomainId}, #{code}, #{channel}, #{expiresAt}, #{maxUses}, 0, 'active', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE invitation_code SET used_count = used_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
